title: elaphoglossum obovatum
intro: Elaphoglossum obovatum, also known as Obovate Elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in tropical regions, and has been found to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum obovatum include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. Elaphoglossum obovatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched and confirmed.
